word: H4393 - מְלֹא - mᵉlôʼ - mel-o' - [idiom] all along

sections.paragraph:
Original: מלו מלוא מלא

Transliteration: melô' melô' melô

Phonetic: mel-o'

BDB Definition:

  1. fulness, that which fills
    1. fulness, handful
    2. mass, multitude
    3. fulness, that which fills, entire contents
    4. full length, full line

Origin: from H4390

TWOT entry: 1195b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
